DecisionCardMeta.description: Cross-gate context surfaced to the operator with every DecisionCard.

OverrideEvent.description: One operator-approved override that affects cache warmth and routing context.

event_id.description: UUID4 identity for this override event.

new_value.description: Canonical JSON-like view of the new setting.

operator_id.description: Operator identity that confirmed the override.

previous_value.description: Canonical JSON-like view of the previous setting.
previous_value.title: Previous Value

evidence.description: Machine-readable supporting evidence snippets for the proposal.

gate_id.description: Discriminator for the G2C pre-execution gate.

meta.description: Cross-gate cache and override context per architecture D2.

ready_nodes.description: Manifest nodes currently ready to execute.

risks.description: Plain-language risk bullets surfaced to the operator.
